subject: ack
body:
Visual QA done:

DEBRIS/metal (ec6d8d0a): KEEP 0, 28, 56
  (clear bolted sheet + cool industrial piles). Runners-up: 16, 32, 44, 48.

BUSHES (0eed43e8): KEEP 1, 28, 60
  (dark dense masses; 60 has cool blue-green that fits industrial). Runners-up: 0, 8, 20, 44.

Avoid warm yellow-heavy bushes if possible. Ship these into game props next.
